business_question: Which product categories have the highest inventory turnover rates?
business_context: Inventory managers want to identify categories that efficiently convert inventory into sales.
sql_answer:
WITH inventory_avg AS (
    SELECT
        PRODUCT_KEY,
        AVG(ON_HAND_UNITS) AS AVG_INVENTORY
    FROM FACT_INVENTORY_SNAPSHOT
    GROUP BY PRODUCT_KEY
)
SELECT
    p.CATEGORY,
    SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_UNITS_SOLD,
    AVG(i.AVG_INVENTORY) AS AVG_INVENTORY,
    ROUND(
        SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) /
        NULLIF(AVG(i.AVG_INVENTORY),0),
        2
    ) AS INVENTORY_TURNOVER
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN inventory_avg i
    ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = i.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.CATEGORY
ORDER BY INVENTORY_TURNOVER DESC;
